summary: Good audience‑sourced recording captures a nice set highlighted by TLMD and an atmospheric crowd mix.
review: The audience‑level recording is well balanced, giving the show a pleasant live feel. Reviewers describe the set as "nice" and especially enjoy the moments when TLMD appears, indicating a solid musical performance despite the lack of detailed commentary on individual playing.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) praising both the set and the audience mix; limited data leads to a modest rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience background level is noted as adding atmosphere, suggesting a clear enough mix without major issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall described as a nice set; reviewers appreciate the flow especially when TLMD is performed.
